task: Using the supplied embedded packet (four records, metric map, limits, decision budget, sensitivity and thresholds), compute derived metrics and per-record normalized risk using the exact formula: risk = metric1/limit1 + metric2/limit2 + 0.5*metric3/limit3 - 0.4*metric4/limit4. Classify each record (fail if risk>1.15, warn if 0.95-1.15, pass otherwise). Compute calibration priorities, residual margin, and the smallest defensible intervention per record; produce decision rationale and a final recommendation table. Produce two deliverables: array_coupling_calibration.xlsx (with formulas/executable logic, validation checks, and record-level citations) and calibration_plan.md (narrative rationale, sensitivity notes, intervention descriptions, and cost/effort estimates). All calculations and recommendations must use only the embedded packet; mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions.
